prestazioni: Lingenfelter L98 383ci stroker kit (based on the L98 350ci V8, bored to 4.030" with a 3.75" stroke crank, forged Eagle rods, and JE 12.5:1 pistons) paired with a custom Comp Cams 280/288 hydraulic roller camshaft (0.550" lift, 230/238 duration @ 0.050") for 450+ HP on 93 octane

Accufab 58mm throttle body with a port-matched Lingenfelter intake manifold (L98-specific) and a custom 80mm BBK cold air intake system, feeding a FAST XFI 2.0 standalone ECU with custom Lingenfelter base maps for optimized AFR and timing

Custom 3" stainless steel exhaust system by Stainless Works with 1.75" primary headers (equal-length, 4-into-1 merge collectors), Borla Pro XS mufflers (2.5" outlets), and a custom X-pipe with Vibrant 1792 resonators for aggressive tone without drone
estetica: RK Sport C4-specific widebody conversion kit (ZR-1-inspired, 2" wider fenders front/rear) with custom carbon fiber side skirts and a RK Sport rear diffuser, all painted in PPG HOK Custom Mix "Midnight Purple Pearl"

Dymag Carbon Revolution CR9 17x9.5" (front) and 17x11" (rear) wheels with Nitto NT05R 275/40/17 and 315/35/17 tires, paired with C4-specific Wilwood 6-piston front and 4-piston rear calipers with slotted/drilled rotors (13.5" front, 12.5" rear)

Custom ZR-1-style fixed carbon fiber rear wing by APR Performance (GT-250 model, 60" span, 8" chord) with adjustable angle mounts, paired with a carbon fiber front splitter by Seibon (C4-specific, 3" overhang) and a custom hood scoop for the Lingenfelter intake
